benefits.description: Strength improvements better than remembered from previous training at younger age
Very rarely gets sore after strenuous lifting
Arthritic shoulder pain reduced from baseline 6/10 to 3/10. Previously would reach 8/10 with strenuous activity, now remains at 3/10

protocol_notes: Age 54 male. On week 8 of cycle at time of comment. Started lifting again right before starting cycle. Injects before bed and first thing in morning. Only drinks black coffee after injection. Avoids eating for approximately 1 hour after injection. Uses technique of finding non-sensitive injection spots by poking around lightly before injection. Had severely arthritic shoulder that prevented lifting for 5 years prior to cycle.
